title: Insertion Sort
code:
isort :: [num] -> [num]
isort []     = []
isort (x:xs) = insert x (isort xs)

insert :: num -> [num] -> [num]
insert x []     = [x]
insert x (y:ys) = x : y : ys, if x <= y
                = y : insert x ys, otherwise
description: Insertion sort in Miranda using guarded right-hand sides. Each element is inserted into its correct position in the already-sorted tail. Clean and readable — showcases Miranda's equation-based function definitions.
